issue: Task context returns only haus.tanstack-query-router-patterns and drops nextjs/react19/typescript baseline rules that the implementation actually needs.
expected: Implementation tasks against Next.js routes should retain at least nextjs-patterns + react19-patterns + typescript6-patterns alongside any specific accessory rule the task names.
rootCauseHypothesis: src/commands/context.ts `pickTaskRelevantRules` matches task tokens against ${id} ${reason} corpus; "dashboard"/"tanstack"/"mutation" hit only one rule id, so the filter collapses to that single result and never re-adds the base ecosystem rules.
resolvedByTest: tests/golden/context/nextjs-app.json (build dashboard route + add tanstack query mutation require nextjs+react19+typescript6, no playwright/pkg-mgr)
tests/cross-bleed.test.js (nextjs-app / build dashboard route rejects testing rules)
